description: CSS floats: left/right floated blocks and a floated image with text wrap, stacked right floats, and clear:both.
visual_assertions: Text wraps to the right of the left-floated box and re-widens below it.
The right-floated box and the right-floated image sit side by side; text wraps around both without overlapping either.
The clear:both block starts below every float above it, full width.
